project_summary: A project to enable outstation rides (one-way or round trips) between cities with structured fare calculations, manual/auto driver assignment, and fare verification via odometer readings and OTPs. All rides are prebooked 30 minutes from current time to ensure fulfillment, with fare calculations based on distance, time, and waiting charges.

modules.name: Passenger App
modules.description: Allows passengers to book outstation rides (one-way or round trips) with options for instant (30 mins later) or scheduled bookings. Handles fare preview, ride type selection, and trip scheduling.

modules.name: Agent Portal
modules.description: Enables agents to manually assign drivers to outstation rides, edit trip details, and cancel trips based on passenger requests. Displays all booked rides for assignment.

modules.name: Driver App
modules.description: Receives ride requests, tracks trip start/end via odometer readings, and verifies rides with OTPs. Handles fare calculations based on actual distance and time.

modules.name: Fare Calculation Engine
modules.description: Computes pre-ride and post-ride fares for one-way and round trips based on distance, time, waiting charges, and vehicle category. Uses admin-configured rates per zone.

modules.name: Admin Portal
modules.description: Configures outstation fare settings per zone and vehicle category, including per km rates, waiting charges, and travel time thresholds.

modules.name: Assignment System
modules.description: Handles manual and auto-assignment of drivers to outstation rides. Auto-assigns drivers if manual assignment isn't completed 10 minutes before ride time.

tasks.title: Implement passenger app flow for outstation ride booking
tasks.description: Develop UI/UX for one-way and round trip selections, fare preview, and scheduling (ride now/later) in the passenger app.

tasks.title: Develop agent portal for manual ride assignment
tasks.description: Build agent interface to view, assign, edit, and cancel outstation rides. Include 15-minute assignment deadline alerts.

tasks.title: Design and implement fare calculation engine
tasks.description: Create backend logic for pre-ride and post-ride fare calculations for one-way and round trips, including waiting time charges.

tasks.title: Integrate odometer reading and OTP verification
tasks.description: Implement driver app features to capture odometer readings at start/end of trips and verify rides with OTPs shared with passengers.

tasks.title: Configure admin portal for fare settings
tasks.description: Add admin configurations for outstation fare per km, return fare per km, waiting charges, and travel time thresholds per zone.

tasks.title: Develop auto-assignment system for drivers
tasks.description: Implement logic to auto-assign nearby available drivers to outstation rides if manual assignment isn't completed 10 minutes before ride time.

tasks.title: Implement ride scheduling logic
tasks.description: Enable passengers to schedule rides up to 8 days in advance with start/return date and time selections for round trips.

tasks.title: Test fare calculation scenarios
tasks.description: Validate fare calculations for various scenarios (e.g., exact travel time vs. waiting time) with edge cases and error handling.

tasks.title: Ensure compliance with business rules
tasks.description: Enforce rules like ride start from operational cities, no manual fare entry by drivers, and OTP/odometer verification for dispute prevention.

risks.risk: Driver unavailability for outstation rides leading to cancellations.
Incorrect fare calculations due to misconfigured admin settings or edge cases in travel time.
Passenger disputes over odometer readings or fare discrepancies.
Manual assignment delays causing auto-assignment failures or ride cancellations.
Integration issues between passenger app, agent portal, and driver app workflows.
Regional variations in travel time or fare settings causing inconsistencies.
